Video.summary: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.
Video.title: Killer In The Halloween Mask

Video.summary: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 1

Video.summary: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a security guard turned thief as he searches for the money he stole and lost.
Video.title: Million Dollar Misunderstanding

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness.
Video.title: The Big Fall

Video.summary: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.
Video.title: Waiting For Mr. Wrong

Video.summary: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.
Video.title: Think Blue

Video.summary: Hunter pursues a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to kill the participants in his trial.
Video.title: Blow-Up

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison
Video.title: War Zone

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.
Video.title: Burned

Video.summary: When a dying contract killer confesses he was paid to kill Hunter's father, Hunter pursues the true murderer.
Video.title: Scrap Metal

Video.summary: A teenager's death leads Hunter and McCall to a Fagin who commands a group of barrio boys to commit crimes.
Video.title: Fagin 1986

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a student terror group in the car bombing of a Middle-Eastern consulate member.
Video.title: 62 Hrs. Of Terror

Video.summary: Hunter investigates a theft turned murder when a robbery victim hires a detective to retrieve stolen jewels.
Video.title: Death Machine

Video.summary: Wrongly suspended from the force for beating a suspect, Hunter pursues the gangster who had him discredited.
Video.title: The Setup

Video.summary: When a dead girl disappears from Hunter's living room, he and McCall follow a trail of intrigue and murder.
Video.title: The Beautiful & The Dead, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's investigation into adultery and homicide pits them against a group of Russian spies.
Video.title: The Beautiful & The Dead, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and Dee get a murder case reopened in order to exonerate a paroled ex-boxer and find the real killer.
Video.title: The Return Of Typhoon Thompson

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate mysterious calls to a reporter about a series of murders.
Video.title: Saturday Night Special

Video.summary: Hunter attempts to apprehend a vicious robbery suspect while he clashes with a vindictive reporter.
Video.title: Overnight Sensation

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must work individually after they are separated as partners by their new precinct leader.
Video.title: Change Partners And Dance

Video.summary: While investigating a homicide, McCall falls in love with the prime suspect - the victim's husband.
Video.title: Crime Of Passion

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall attempt to break a cocaine syndicate apparently being run by one of Hunter's ex-partners.
Video.title: The Castro Connection

Video.summary: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death
Video.title: High Noon In L.A.

Video.summary: A police detective aids in solving a series of murders connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.
Video.title: From San Francisco With Love

Video.summary: The search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.
Video.title: True Confessions
